raw_text: juan salvago arteche +34 659415180 juan.salvago.arteche@outlook.com ronda del ingenioso hidalgo n2 111, 28034, madrid aerospace engineer graduate specialized in navigation and aerospace systems, at the technical university of madrid. highly motivated and willing to learn more about the aerospace industry. seeking an entry-level position in the sector. education e 2015 - present. m.sc. air transport systems at the technical university of madrid (upm) e 2015 - masters in professional development at the university of alcalá de henares. gaia program e 2010-2015. bachelors degree in aerospace engineering at the technical university of madrid (upm) e 2004-2010. high school ies principe felipe. honors qualification in science and technology. work experience e currently in an internship at airbus defence space. working at the fuel, tank inerting fire department. validation and verification processes of the light & medium family (c-212, c-235, c-295) and derivatives military aircraft programmes (a330 mrtt). implementing new system architecture for a330 mrtt fire protection system. certification processes of new enhanced a330 mrtt aircraft (singapore, france, korea) e 2014. internship at airbus defence . space from january to april. worked at the fuel, tank inerting : fire department. validation and verification processes of the light & medium family (c-212, c-235, c-295). implementation of the centralized maintenance system in c-295. e 2010-2014. worked as a private teacher, teaching high school and university students. computer skills e matlab . fortran 95 . microsoft office word , excel, powerpoint e design programmes: corel draw x7, corel photo paint x7, autocad, global mapper e airbus programmes: vault, sprint, see expert languages e spanish, native speaker . english, c1 level. certificate in advanced english (196/210) e french, basic level. institute francais (2013-2014)
